home.title: UltraModul Enterprise Platform
home.subtitle: Zero Amnesia. Zero Redundancy.
home.welcome: Welcome to the Active Identity Console

iam.title: Identity & Access Matrix
iam.desc: Centralized management of all user permissions in one console. All activities are automatically monitored by the Panopticon Logbook.
iam.ztDesc: All authorization changes in this console will be permanently recorded into the Audit Log ledger.
iam.tooltipJit: Panic Button: JIT Emergency Bypass (30 Min)
iam.alertExportFail: Format Not Enabled for Front-end Download. Awaiting DuckDB Wasm integration.
iam.alertJitConfirm: Activate God Access (JIT Bypass) for 30 minutes? Logbook Sirens will sound!
iam.alertJitSuccess: JIT Active. All Navigation Menus unlocked for this User for the next 30 minutes.
iam.alertPassConfirm: Are you sure you want to generate a new password for UID {uid}? The old password will be voided.
iam.alertPassSuccessFallback:
SUCCESS! New password for UID {uid} generated.

Please block and COPY the password in the box below NOW:
iam.alertPassFail: Failed to generate password. Contact sysadmin.
iam.alertDelConfirm:
CRITICAL WARNING!

You are about to request permanent deletion for UID {uid} to the Server. Proceed?
iam.alertDelSuccess: Execution verdict for {uid} has entered the Approval Inbox.
iam.alertBulkDelConfirm:
MULTIPLE CRITICAL WARNING!

You are about to request mass deletion for {count} identities at once to the Approval Inbox. Proceed?
iam.alertBulkDelSuccess: Successfully threw {count} mass deletion requests into the Approval Inbox.
iam.noIdentityDesc: User identity list is completely empty.
iam.msgAudit: Audit log has been recorded automatically.

testbus.alertSignal: Danger signal from Nerve Module! (Inter-Communication Example)
testbus.pageSubtitle: Dummy Module (Module A) Sending Data to Header (Module B)
testbus.mfDesc: This page absolutely does NOT import `Header` code. However, if you press the button below, the Bell in the top right corner of the entire app will chime. This module is registered invisibly via the Module Registry.
testbus.inputPlaceholder: Type intelligence secret to throw across modules...

public.waitRoomDesc: Your identity is under strict escort and automatic/IAM verification. Please patiently wait for activation.

pengaduan.title: Public Complaint Service
pengaduan.desc: Submit complaints and reports directly to the related unit. Fully monitored by logbook.
pengaduan.successDesc: Your complaint ticket is strictly bound to your Universal ID and dispatched to the Multi-Channel Gateway. Keep monitoring its status.
pengaduan.placeholder: Explain the exact time, location, and individuals involved...

maintenance.title: Aegis Database Panopticon
maintenance.desc: Ultra-secure bunker for 1-click database maintenance. DANGER: Extreme actions possible.

evolution.title: Data Evolution Center
evolution.desc: World-class Quarterly Performance Routine. 1-Way Linear Stepper Protocol.

omniforge.title: The Omni-Forge
omniforge.desc: Dual-Way Conversion Terminal & Universal Data Repair Sabotage Engine.
omniforge.healerDesc: Our Omni-Healer engine will scan for orphaned relations, broken UTF-8 encoding, missing commas in CSV, and illegal schema types, then automatically stitch them back.
omniforge.serverDesc: The operation was performed securely on the Next.js Server Instance. No mock data was used. Your operation hit the physical SQLite tables.

warroom.title: Nexus Vault
warroom.emptyVaultDesc: No Policy Folders have been created yet. PUM is a Blank Canvas. Please create a new Folder to simulate a specific scenario.
warroom.deleteMapPrompt: Destroy this Folder and all its data?
warroom.oracleReady: Oracle System active. I am analyzing the {folderName} folder. Give your instructions.
warroom.oracleResponse: Based on the matrix settings in Folder {folderName}, the trend shows a strong correlation according to the assembled formula.

profile.title: Identity Vault
profile.rootWarning: The SYSTEM_ROOT account is an emergency bypass. This profile cannot be modified from the web interface for absolute security reasons.
profile.passwordMismatch: New Password confirmation does not match.

codex.title: Omni-Codex Global Registry
codex.desc: National Metadata Library (Rosetta Stone). Dictionaries uploaded here will automatically be available to all Analysts across the platform to translate codifications into human language in Real-Time.
codex.emptyList: No Dictionaries/Metadata registered yet. Please upload in the adjacent panel.
codex.alertFill: Fill Dictionary Name and Target Column!

access.title: Active Identity Matrix
access.subtitle: Cross-Module Authority Grid (LIVE)
access.matrixDesc: Assign module clearance levels directly to SQLite.

evolution.logExtractSuccess: [System] File successfully extracted to DuckDB WASM RAM.

mandate.emptyDesc: No task delegations have been published yet.

analytics.publishSuccess: Dataset successfully published to Standard Catalog!
analytics.confirmDelete: Delete this dataset widget from catalog?
analytics.loadFail: Failed to load dataset from Catalog.
analytics.emptyState: Select a dataset widget published by Admin. PUM operates as a Blank Canvas, the data below is a direct reflection of the files processed in the Advanced room.
analytics.emptyCatalogDesc: No datasets have been published yet. Please switch to ADVANCED mode, upload a file, and click 'Publish to Catalog'.

complaints.welcomeMsg: Hello! I am the PUM Nexus *Zero-Form* system. Tell me your problems, complaints, or suggestions in everyday language. I will process the rest.
complaints.placeholder: Type operational/incident log here (e.g., 'Anomaly occurred in sub-system B')...

recovery.desc: God-tier feature. Select a bundle archive (.ZIP) previously downloaded from this system. The VPS will be entirely overwritten and resurrected with the contents of this ZIP.

devmanual.subtitle: World-Class Remote Team Orchestration Blueprint. Standard operating procedure for Zero-Trust architecture used by enterprise teams.
devmanual.p1Desc: There is NO manual file transfer. The project resides safely in the Git Cloud Repository.
devmanual.p1S2: Admin invites developer usernames via Settings > Collaborators.
devmanual.p1S4: The codebase is instantly cloned locally without DB credentials.
devmanual.p2Warning: Developers have ZERO access to real production data. They operate completely blindfolded on dummy local databases.
devmanual.p2L1: Local DB files are sealed via .gitignore.
devmanual.p2L2: Code clone contains structural schema only, zero sensitive records.
devmanual.p2L3: Developers use `drizzle-kit push` locally for dummy environments.
devmanual.p3Desc: Never push directly to the main timeline. All developers must operate in isolated branches.
devmanual.p3Merge1: Developer completes module, pushes to local branch, and opens a Pull Request (PR).
devmanual.p3Merge2: Admin reviews the code changes thoroughly.
devmanual.p3Merge3: If approved, Admin merges to main. Code is smoothly integrated without collision.
devmanual.p4Desc: Developers DO NOT NEED AND WILL NOT GET SSH access to the production server.
devmanual.p4L1: Deployment scripts containing server keys are strictly secured.
devmanual.p4L3: Only the Admin holds the 'Veto' right to execute remote deployment hooks.
